Title: The Recall
Briefing: A junior analyst inside Kasumi Dynamics defected last cycle with a slab of internal memos. The board wants the leak plugged before the press picks it up. Fast.

Title: Tarmac Audit
Briefing: An auditor from the Razor is on a flight inbound. If they land, the books get opened. If they don't, somebody asks why. Pick the lesser bruise.

Title: The Noor Problem
Briefing: Operations Division wants Finance Division's deputy reassigned. By any means. The board hasn't been told. Keep it that way.
